positive: A celestial, cosmic mural featuring a giant, stylized neon constellation map winding through blooming floral clusters and interlocking geometric celestial bodies. The style is modern psychedelic art mixed with retro synthwave aesthetics. The primary color palette is deep indigo, electric cyan, vibrant magenta, and gold leaf accents. The composition is highly symmetrical and circular, framing a central nebula of swirling pastel blues and purples. Crisp lines, high contrast silhouette against a dark background, perfect for a clean, repeating pattern or central apparel print. Flat graphic design mixed with realistic cosmic elements. Highly detailed, pop art, vaporwave, vector illustration quality.
negative: blurry, noisy, low detail, artifacts, watermark, text, logos, signature, messy, grainy, ugly, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition
